Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-04-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John J. Weber, Esq., Lewis, Brisbois, Bisgaard & Smith, (213) 250-1800, for Defendant and Moving Party Health Net, Inc.
Joy Young Stephenson, Esq., and Mark W. Hostetter, Esq., Stephenson, Acquisto & Colman, (818) 559-4477, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Stanford University Hospital
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT HEALTH NET, INC., AFFILIATES' Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration: GRANTED. Action is stayed pending outcome of arbitration. Defendant Health Net's demand for arbitration shall be filed by 10/25/04. Defendant is to submit proposed order. (301/JLW/jc-x) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
